title: Planning integration receipt
description: Checked-in target-branch receipt for an applied Planning lifecycle integration proposal.

kind.description: Schema discriminator for Planning integration receipt records.

id.description: Stable receipt identifier, matching the applied proposal id.

proposal_ref.description: Repo-relative proposal record path that was applied.

requested_transition.description: Planning lifecycle transition applied from the proposal.

id.description: Planning owner id covered by the receipt.

ref.description: Repo-relative owner record path covered by the receipt.

owner.description: Planning owner subject covered by the receipt.

external_ref.description: Optional external issue or tracker reference associated with the receipt.

proof_refs.description: Evidence references carried from the applied proposal.

parent_boundary.description: Boundary that kept parent, lane, and aggregate truth independent before apply.

changed_fields.description: Fields changed by the atomic apply transaction.

expected_subject.description: Subject revision required by the pending proposal.

subject_before.description: Subject revision observed immediately before apply.

subject_after.description: Subject revision observed immediately after apply.

proposal_before.description: Proposal revision observed before marking it integrated.

proposal_after.description: Proposal revision after marking it integrated.

expected_planning_revision.description: Advisory Planning revision captured in the apply request.

revisions.description: Revision tokens observed and emitted by target-branch compare-and-apply.

integrated_truth.description: Authority statement for integrated lifecycle truth.

proposal_status.description: Authority statement for the proposal status transition.

owner_body.description: Boundary statement excluding owner body rewrites.

aggregate_indexes.description: Boundary statement excluding aggregate index rewrites.

authority_boundary.description: Explicit boundary for what the receipt makes authoritative.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp recorded by the receipt writer.

receipt_revision.description: Content revision token for the receipt record.
